nts1.d: The finest London selection of Japanese grooves, from the 30s to 80s, and more. Anything from folk, jazz, psychedelia, new wave, soul, disco and electronic, all Made In Japan.
Nick Malkin hosts Post-Geography, featuring ambient and atmospheric selections, live from the NTS studio in L.A.

nts1.n: THE ONE GLOVE BREAKFAST SHOW W/ MACCA & Spraoi Mór
THE EXTENDED PLAY SESSIONS W/ MR PEDRO

nts2.d: Popstar Benny, DJ & producer based in Atlanta, Georgia

some time ago i came across the idea that ambient music didn’t truly begin with artists like brian eno, but can be traced back to classical music and its power to shift listeners into different states of mind. guided by that thought, i’ve been exploring and collecting contemporary works that use classical instruments while pushing further into ambient territories. This is a selection of pieces released between 2010 and 2025.

nts2.n: I WALK YOU DRIVE w/ KONSTANTINA YAN
Yugoslav New Wave Classics ’70s–’80s w/ Johana
88 Keys To Heaven w/ Mystery Season
Just A Thought w/ Bunny Hoova
ACROSS THE HORIZON W/ BOB HOLMES (SUSS)

subtle.d: Live & Direct is the show that promises to make you dance and make you laugh, with your fave tunes that make you go 'Rahhh ain't hear this in time' and all the cheesy jokes from me, Hannah :) Lock in for the sickest guests and the most relatable stories about daily slips and hilarious situations I find myself in.

Bristol-born and London-based, Not Bad For A Girl resident DaiSu has been involved in the music scene since 2018 and has featured on stations such as Radio 1 Dance, BBC 6 Music and Melodic Distraction, as well as playing on line ups for Keep Hush, Skiddle and Red Bull. Her penchant for bass, breaks and 2-step has landed her gigs supporting acts such as Interplanetary Criminal, Main Phase, Craigie Knowes and Big Ang. In September 2022, her debut EP ‘Lightwork’ was released with Gather Records and was featured in DJ Mag's staff picks that same month.

Vinyl DJ from Leigh-on-Sea. Loves collecting records with a wide array of taste ranging from House and Techno to Grime, Dubstep and Jungle. Garage holds a special place in his heart and makes up the largest part of my collection and DJ sets.

DJ & Producer hailing from Watford influenced by Hip-Hop, Dubstep, Grime with releases on NSX records & Ghost Phone, spinning electronic genres from R&B edits, Drum and Bass and everything in between.
Highlander brings you 2 hours of the freshest Jungle, Hardcore, Dubstep and Breaks. 3rd Saturday 7-9pm lock in!

subtle.n: The Wheel Up Show w/ Tripta
What's The Weather, Selecta? w/ Megan Wroe

subtle.d:
Hailing from Mumbai, now living in London, Chaitu is energised by the UK sound and scene.

With a love of all things weird, weighty and groovy; his mixes and productions bridge electro, techno, breaks, UKG and Jungle, with sprinklings of everything in between.

Chaitu champions provocative beats that break down the barriers of style, genre and expectation, all while keeping you moving.

In:flux Audio are a record label based in Leeds, UK founded by production duo Tik&Borrow. Since the label's inception in October 2013, they have dabbled in multiple dance music styles with the emphasis always being on the tracks being unique, and packed full of bass. Today the primary output for the label is from their Dubstep roster and this is focus of their show on Subtle - giving the artists and remixers chance to showcase their sounds with an hour guest mix, all hosted by label bossman Tik.

I’m a 19 year old DJ and producer from Newcastle upon Tyne, mainly playing and producing music around the 140bpm mark. I started out playing old 2-step and jungle records, before moving my focus to mainly dubstep and grime. Along with my friends Pirata and White Label, I run Newcastle’s only current 140 night, Well Irie.

subtle.n: THE CULTURE HEAD w. SAINT VOX
Skelecta presents: South London Dance Factory

subtle.d: Hailing from northern Italy, STANDARD is a collective of artists, DJs and producers that aims at the promotion of bass music: Garage, UK Funky, Breaks, Leftfield Bass, Leftfield Techno, Dubstep, everything in between and beyond. They focus on the Italian Bass scene, showcasing new up-and-coming artists as well as established talents from all over the peninsula.

Oddkut is a producer & DJ hailing from Balakovo City, Russia. He's part of the Russian collective "United Gang" who are a Moscow-based community of local musicians, DJ's and promoters teamed up by their genuine love & interest in UK underground music, "TAЭT VREMYA" art group and the creator of the Moscow parties "Judder".

Kishan is a DJ and Producer currently based in London. Actively involved in the music scene already, he produces and mixes a wide range of genres including UK Garage, Drum & Bass, House, Disco and Afrobeat.

subtle.n: Out of Phase With Sam Ling

subtle.d: Sessions w/ Amy B is an underground multi-genre music show, showcasing the most prolific guests from all corners of the music industry.

Originally linking up in Wellington and playing shows with the Breaking Beats crew, Swampman and Zero Crumbs have reunited – bringing their smooth mixing and flexible selections to East London. 

In their monthly show, the pair explore the deep, dark, and soulful ends of DNB. Expect fresh underground tunes, deep cut classics, and a bit of banter in Kiwi accents.

Elyn Kazarian – Her Vision Her Voice

FROM THE VAULTS:  Coldcut & Matt Black – Live dublab Performance, Mix & Interview (11.07.00)

dublab.d: “Dying Songs focuses on melancholic electronic music but isn’t limited to that. Sometimes it gets dark, sometimes I try to mix techno awkwardly, sometimes i get nostalgic… I like stuff that’s dreamy, ghostly, pretty and sad. I’ll try out new productions of my own, as well. I’m keeping it pretty open and we’ll see how it evolves.” – Jimmy

dublab.n: George Jensen and Heavy Hymns - Quietudes
Daddy Differently and Dirty Dave - Things of Life
dublab.d: It’s the simple things isn’t it? The little things of life. Good food, sunshine, no traffic, dark coffee, 72˚ breeze, telephone off the hook and music every Friday morning a la Daddy Differently & Dirty Dave.
Peak Oil records presents ‘tipping point’; a monthly journey through the record collections of brian and brion. Leaving no good genre unturned, enjoy two hours of esoterica, conversation and guests.

newtown.n: SQUINTZ & RACOONS MORNING ZOO IN THE AFTERNOON
FROM THE HEART OF A POET MORNING SHOW
